title: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1991/1992 SNES design; genre evidence from archived Wii U Virtual Console product page (data-genre Action), observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Light/Dark World mirrors and item tools rewrite dungeon routes across one dual overworld.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: Shared item verbs solve both combat and puzzle gates without separate dungeon languages.
exemplar_rationale: Classic item-gated adventure where exploration tools double as combat solutions.

evidence.claim: Archived Nintendo Wii U Virtual Console product page listed data-genre as: Action.
evidence.platform: Nintendo Store (archived Wii U Virtual Console)
